title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: lightweight, extensible framework to run Llama 2, Code Llama, Mistral, Gemma, etc. locally via CLI and REST API.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, list models with async support.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same API surface as Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use Ollama models for chat, tools, embeddings, retrieval.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-style); chat history, model manager, multi-user, RAG.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; sync/async, streaming, embeddings, list/pull/delete models.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust crate for Ollama; strongly typed, tokio-based async, streaming, embed endpoints.

title: ollama-chat
summary: Simple CLI chat wrapper around ollama-js; start chatting in two commands.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing local Ollama models as GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by Ollama team; generator & embedder nodes for pipelines.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal Streamlit RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma; ready-to-run Docker compose.

title: ollama-fastapi
summary: Official FastAPI wrapper exposing extra endpoints (bulk embed, batch chat) around Ollama.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-host Discord bot that chats, generates images (via llava), and moderates with Ollama.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU & PVC support.

title: ollama-macos-swift
summary: Swift package + SwiftUI example app for macOS that wraps Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-django
summary: Reusable Django app adding Ollama chat & embed endpoints with admin UI to switch models.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community-maintained C# .NET client for Ollama; supports .NET 6+, streaming, embeddings.

title: ollama-nest
summary: NestJS module wrapping ollama-js; injectable services, interceptors, Swagger docs out-of-box.

title: ollama-cli-utils
summary: Collection of tiny CLI utilities (bulk pull, model stats, chat replay) for power users.

title: ollama-pypi
summary: PyPI landing for official ollama-python SDK; quick install, usage snippets, changelog.
